item.title: Idaho never fails to disappoint...
item.description: Homophobes had to have their own pride fest... Didn't turn out too well... As an Idahoan, I'm disappointed, but not surprised. Disappointed that we'd even have an event like this, let me be clear. Description from Latter Gay Stories page: BOISE, Idaho — A two-day festival intended to counter Pride Month celebrations in Boise, Idaho, fell flat on June 20-21, 2025, as the “Hetero Awesome Fest” drew sparse crowds to Cecil D. Andrus Park, across from the Idaho state Capitol. Organized by Mark Fitzpatrick, owner of the Old State Saloon in Eagle, the event aimed to promote “traditional family values” with live music, food vendors, and speakers. Fitzpatrick, who launched “Heterosexual Awesomeness Month” last year, described the festival as a celebration of “faith, family, and freedom.” However, the event faced immediate backlash for its timing during Pride Month and its perceived anti-LGBTQ+ stance, fueled by the saloon’s Instagram posts criticizing the “wicked” LGBTQ+ agenda and promoting conspiracy theories. Local media, including Idaho News 6, reported that turnout was negligible, with one observer noting the festival “probably could have been an email.” Social media reactions highlighted the event’s poor naming and execution, with one commenter stating, “Look at how much of a waste of time and money hatred is.” The festival struggled to secure sponsorships, raising only half the needed funds despite support from United Rentals and a headline performance by Michael Austin. Reports suggest the event was attended by fewer than 100 people. In contrast, Boise’s LGBTQ+ community responded with a satirical counter-event at The Balcony Club titled “But, What About Straight Pride?” Held on June 20, the show drew significant attendance and support, underscoring the city’s embrace of inclusivity. The flop of Fitzpatrick’s Hetero Fest, juxtaposed with the success of the counter-event, reinforced Boise’s shifting cultural landscape, where messages of acceptance resonated more strongly than division. Queer people are part of our communities and they always will be. Supporters of the Festival have now turned to social media asking for money to cover expenses including security costs—exceeding $18,000, money they expected to raise from the attendees that never showed up.
item.dc:creator: ewakemanVA

item.title: Aitzaz Hasan, What a hero. At just 15 years old as well. Must have been absolutely terrifying to confront a man covered in explosives
item.description: Aitzaz Hasan was a 15-year-old Pakistani student who, on January 6, 2014, confronted a suicide bomber outside his school in Hangu, Pakistan. Spotting a detonator, he tried to stop the bomber from entering, where around 2,000 students were present. The bomber detonated, killing Aitzaz but sparing the school. Yes, Aitzaz died in the act. His sacrifice saved many lives, earning him posthumous recognition as a national hero, including the Sitara-e-Shujaat award. His school was renamed in his honor, and his story is widely celebrated without notable controversy.
item.dc:creator: Maroccan

item.title: September 21, 1990 I took my dad to the movies. We saw Goodfellas.
item.description:
I remember everything about that day.
I was 17. I saved $20 for movies and popcorn with my dad.
We had the best time.
It was 2 hours 25 minutes of gangsters & how to make "killer" sauce in prison.
In 2018 my mom gave me the news. I miss you dad. I miss you so much. Every minute with my dad was worth it. I would not change a thing. He was the best human on this planet. I love you, Dad. Catherine Scorsese's (Marty Scorsese's mom) pasta & meatballs recipe: One of the highlights of our second Shorter Film Festival was Italianamerican, Martin Scorsese's 1974 documentary about his parents Catherine and Charles (If you missed it, the 45 minute film is on YouTube). In it, Mrs Scorsese cooks up a delicious meal for her husband and son and the recipe plays over the end credits. Because we didn't see anyone jotting it down, we thought we'd share it with you here. The Sauce: Singe an onion & a pinch of garlic in oil. Throw in a piece of veal, a piece of beef, some pork sausage & a lamb neck bone, Add a basil leaf. When the meat is brown take it out, & put it on a plate. Put in a can of tomato paste & some water. Pass a can of packed whole tomatoes through a blender & pour it in. Let it boil. Add salt, pepper & a pinch of sugar. Let it cook for awhile. Throw the meat back in. Cook for 1 hour Now make the meatballs. Put a slice of bread, without crust, 2 eggs, & a drop of milk, into a bowl of ground veal and beef. Add salt, pepper, some cheese & a few spoons of sauce. Bit it with your hands, Roll them up, throw them in. Let it cook for another hour. Goodfellas https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0099685/ Catherine Scorsese's pasta https://www.tufnellparkfilmclub.com/blog/2018/5/27/catherine-scorseses-pasta-meatballs-recipe

item.title: Grampa's old truck gettin' a glow up!
item.description:
How it looked before I started. Perfectly reliable...I drive this thing 80 miles a day 5 days a week it never lets me down...but it looked a bit ragged.
How it looks now. Far better! It's not a perfect paintjob, nor was it ever intended to be, but it made it way better than it was and itt'l slow the rust down while I get around to properly repairing the bodywork. 2-4 years, all the patch panels will get put in, then it will get another repaint. By a professional.
item.dc:creator: testecull

item.title: TheVaal-U dump #117 Wheel
item.description:
1. First some housekeeping. The last post should have been #116. This one is #117… Secondly, there are more wheelchair items in this post than I had planned. I left them in because there are some important messages that we all need to hear.
2.
3.
4. A spinning Prayer Wheel. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Prayer_wheel https://buddhaweekly.com/wheel-dharma-prayer-wheels-may-ideal-buddhist-practice-busy-people-benefits-self-sentient-beings-teachers-say/
5. Brooks Walker Fifth Wheel. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fifth_wheel_(Brooks_Walker)
6. Carrol Shelby at the wheel of his Aston Martin DBR1, winning the 1959 24 Hours of Le Mans. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1959_24_Hours_of_Le_Mans https://www.motorsport.com/lemans/news/aston-martin-scored-greatest-victory/6594171/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zh0TUUguQb8
7. Color wheel designed by Goethe in 1809. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Theory_of_Colours https://colorucberkeley.blogspot.com/2013/08/color-wheels.html
8.
9. Frida Kahlo, Magdalena Carmen Frida Kahlo y Calderón (6 July 1907 to 13 July 1954) Kahlo's wheelchair and adjustable easel in La Casa Azul, with a life from her final years. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frida_Kahlo https://frida-kahlo-foundation.org/biography.html/
10. Gandhi and the Spinning Wheel by Margaret Bourke-White, 1946. This photograph soon became an indelible image. https://www.life.com/people/gandhi-and-his-spinning-wheel-the-story-behind-an-iconic-photo/ https://www.icp.org/browse/archive/constituents/margaret-bourke-white https://historycooperative.org/stay-story-mahatma-gandhi/
11.
12. Hedgehog on wheels, from Iran, 1500BC. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OK_MELkqTZw https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Hedgehog_on_wheels-Sb_2908
13. How a wheelwright assembles a wooden wheel. https://wheelwrights.org/making-a-wheel/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5JVcE8gho4k
14.
15.
16. Would you accept random people pushing you out of their way or touching you without permission? A wheelchair is an extension of a person, not an invitation to treat someone without dignity.
17.
18.
19. An alternate ending...
20.
21. Jessi Combs – The Fastest Woman on 4 Wheels. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jessi_Combs https://www.jessicombs.com/
22. In all the jurisdictions that I’m familiar with, this is illegal to have on a passenger vehicle.
23.
24. NASA’s new wheel. https://www3.nasa.gov/specials/wheels/#pg1 https://spacenews.com/researchers-3d-print-moon-rover-wheel-prototype-with-nasa/
25.
26.
27.
28. “Peel at the wheel.” - Diana Rigg, 'The Avengers' – 1967
29.
30.
31.
32. Stick in bicycle wheel spokes. A blank for all the meme wheelers and dealers.
33.
34. Is this a two wheeler?
35. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Noble_Eightfold_Path https://buddhaweekly.com/the-noble-eightfold-path/
36. The oldest wooden wheel was discovered in Slovenia and is over 5,000 years old. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ljubljana_Marshes_Wheel https://www.discovermagazine.com/planet-earth/archaeologists-have-long-sought-but-never-found-the-very-first-wheel
37. The One Wheel Motorcycle, which reached a top speed of 93 mph (1931). Cislaghi Motoruota monowheel, modified by Giuseppe Govetosa. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Monowheel https://rarehistoricalphotos.com/monowheel-historical-photos/
38. The front of the car focuses on a creating a powerful vortex of air that starts from the front wing, flows inside the front wheels and then around the side pods and through the back of the car between the bodywork and the rear wheels. https://formulapedia.com/aerodynamics-f1-car/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X6BrkjnKM9g
39.
40.
41. Water Wheel. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Water_wheel https://energyeducation.ca/encyclopedia/Waterwheel https://physics-network.org/how-does-a-water-wheel-work-physics/
42.
43.
44.
45.
46.
